LanguageData.XEFDiamondBone.label: Diamond Bone
LanguageData.XEFDiamondBone.description:
<color=#ff0000>Diamond Bone and Jaeger become enemies because of the competition for resources, and the Flame Legion takes Diamond Bone as the target of looting, so Jaeger and Flame Legion are always at hostile with Diamond Bone.</color>
Once there is a dragon leading barbarains wrecking the country. In the deepist despair, a savior was sent down to the earth leading army of knights to slay the dragon and this kind savior even spare the barbarians. To show their gratitude, these barbarians king this dragon-slayer and vow to serve him and his descendant. This is the legend of the foundation of Diamond Bon. However, some historian think this is merely a story crated to manipulate the people, and the dragon possibily is the reble leader at that time.
LanguageData.XEFFlameLegion.label: Flame Legion
LanguageData.XEFFlameLegion.description:
<color=#ff0000>The members of the Flame Legion hate the Star Explorer because they were banished, and the Diamond Bone hates Flame Legion because of the looting, so Star Explorer and Diamond Bone are always at hostile with Flame Legion.</color>
A.K.A FFF Legion, the first F represnet fire, second the fear, and third the freedom. It is founded by a StarExplorer noble who was feeling sympathy to those who were exiled, therefore founded a organization to support them. However, this organization was later disbanded by the StarExplorer congress and the nobel's house was also exciled for treason. But this noble, gratituded by those who he had helped, was made to become the leader among the exiled. So he united others who were also forsaked and the tribes to become the Flame Legion.
LanguageData.XEFJaegar.label: Jaeger
LanguageData.XEFJaegar.description:
<color=#ff0000>Jaeger and Diamond Bone became enemies in order to compete for resources, the Jaeger is also hostile to XEO because of the employment contract of the Star Explorer, so Diamond Bone and XEO are always at hostile with Jaeger.</color>
There were once a bunch of space pirates who raid not the village but other pirates. They grow and getting stronger, reformed and slowly become an army and eventually become a force that cannot be ignored. They raid and raid and growing bigger and bigger to the point that only by raiding cannot support it's daily operation, so they reform and evolve and become the Jaeger today.
LanguageData.XEFStarExplorer.label: Star Explorer
LanguageData.XEFStarExplorer.description:
<color=#ff0000>Flame Legion is considered a threat by the Star Explorer for launching terrorist attacks, and the Star Explorer are also hostile to the XEO for historical reasons, so Flame Legion and XEO are always at hostile with Star Explorer.</color>
A giant faction which was originally a group of scientist who were persecuted by politic and religion. However, some of these scientist hold the technology of the space trvel and mining. Under their leadership, they lead their fellow scientist and other exiled outsider to become a high-tech organization, attracting lots of investment, and finally become the StarExplorer today.
LanguageData.XEFXEO.label: XEO
LanguageData.XEFXEO.description:
<color=#ff0000>XEO is feuding with Star Explorer for historical reasons. The Star Explorer has long employed the Jaeger to hunt XEO followers, so Star Explorer and Jaeger are always at hostile with XEO.</color>
A mysterious assassin organization. XEO only by it's name seems meaningless, however, it is said that it's an ancient hieroglyphics representing a kind of highly poisonous plants. And the founder of XEO always use this plant to assassin those abuse their power thus getting this name.
